comment: Brian voiceover for the 3-minute WorldCup26 App Launch Film. Lines are placed at scene/caption timestamps; mux.mjs time-fits each line into its slot so the VO tracks the on-screen captions. Scenes: S1 0-26 intro, S2 26-48 onboarding/referral, S3 48-82 pick entry, S4 82-116 scoring/multipliers, S5 116-146 leaderboard/prize, S6 146-168 referrals/earnings, S7 168-180 outro.

lines.text: Every four years, the whole world stops for one tournament.
Forty-eight nations, one unforgettable month of football.
And now, a brand-new way to play along — from the very first whistle.
Getting in takes just two taps.
Join with a friend's code, and your referral is already set.
Continue with Google, and you're in.
Here's the heart of it — pick any three of the forty-eight nations.
Play it safe for steady points, or chase the bigger upside.
Balance your three: the favorites, the dark horses, the bold call.
Then lock your entry before kickoff.
From here, your teams score for you after every match they play.
And the underdogs? They pay big.
The deeper a team runs, the more every single goal is worth.
Every result rewrites the board — and your points climb in real time.
With forty-eight thousand dollars on the line for the top ten,
you watch your teams rise, match after match.
Climbing into the money.
And right to the final whistle, anyone can still win.
Invite your friends with a tap, and your chain begins.
Three percent from your direct invites, five percent down the chain.
Build your community, and earn every time they win.
Forty-eight teams. One month. Every match, yours to play.
WorldCup twenty-six. Climb — at WorldCup twenty-six dot world.
